title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
